description: Style NoteCrafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its leatherette upper and elegant metal hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. If you're looking for a bag with class and quality, you can expand your collection with this accessory.Product DetailsLeatherette upper Two main compartments with one zipped pocket in one and a mobile pouch in the otherTwo short handles woven through metallic loopsZipped pocket on the back and a stud design on the front for styleMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 27 cmWidth: 45 cmDepth: 9 cm
